creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Stefan Eßer from comment #32)
> Only after all supported FreeBSD releases have received the patched sched.h

Which ones? include/sched.h (with sched_{g,s}etaffinity) doesn't exist on stable/13 and stable/12, let alone any -RELEASE. Besides, stable/* and "main" are moving targets, so only the tip (latest revision) is supported.
